positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic, neon-lit silhouette of a howling wolf howling at a massive, stylized full moon. The background should be a cosmic nebula of deep indigo, violet, and electric teal, creating a sense of ethereal mystery. Incorporate geometric celestial elements (stars, constellations, geometric moons) that connect the wolf and the moon. Style must be ultra-modern, high-contrast graphic vector art, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Use dramatic backlighting and glowing edges on the wolf's fur and the moon's surface. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print, with clean lines and solid color areas.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, jpeg compression, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, muted colors, gradient background, poorly drawn, overly detailed background
